title: A conditionally executed single line should be denoted by indentation
description: A conditionally executed single line should be denoted by indentationAnalyze your codeconsistency-formattedmaintainabilityCode SmellconfusingsuspiciousWhy is this an issue?When the line immediately after conditional statements has neither curly braces nor indentation, the intent of the code is unclear and perhaps not executed as expected. Additionally, such code is confusing to maintainers.The rule will check the line indentation after the following conditional statements:if and if-else statementsfor statementforeach statementdo statementwhile statementif (condition) // Noncompliant DoTheThing(); DoTheOtherThing(); // Was the intent to call this function unconditionally?It becomes even more confusing and bug-prone if lines get commented out.if (condition) // Noncompliant // DoTheThing(); D
recommendation: Review and fix according to the rule guidelines.

checks.message: A conditionally executed single line should be denoted by indentation.
